title: malaxis pedicellaris
intro: Malaxis pedicellaris, also known as the lesser yellow lady's tresses, is a type of orchid native to North America. It is a perennial plant that grows in woodland environments, known for its delicate yellow flowers and slender leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been associated with various health benefits, including wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Malaxis pedicellaris can be prepared as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
